productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Grey Track Pant
description: Composition Grey trackpant made of 100% polyester, has a mesh inner lining, elasticated waist with a drawstring, two pockets on the sides, doggle straps at the hems and adidas patented 3-Stripes at the sides from the waist to the hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or iron on print/logo Dry in shade Warm iron These trackpants from adidas are crafted from 100% polyester to offer comfort during strenuous training sessions. The mesh lining offers breathable comfort and helps combat excessive sweating. Pair it with sports shoes and a jersey to look your best while on the field, or simply wear it with t-shirts for a casual look.
